lessons.title: Advanced Knife Skills
lessons.description: Learn how to properly use a chef's knife for various cutting techniques.
steps: Choose the right knife for the task.
Learn the rocking motion for chopping.
Practice dicing onions and mincing garlic.

lessons.title: Sautéing Techniques
lessons.description: Master the art of sautéing vegetables and proteins.
steps: Choose the right pan and oil.
Preheat the pan before adding ingredients.
Add ingredients in batches to avoid steaming.

lessons.title: Making a Simple Sauce
lessons.description: Create a basic sauce to elevate your dishes.
steps: Start with a roux or a reduction.
Add flavorings such as herbs and spices.
Finish with a splash of acid like lemon juice or vinegar.
